prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年理科组（含物理类）最低位次：2021年约9550（含农学院特殊批次）、2022年约190、2023年约172、2024年约171、2025年约122。剔除2021年农学院批次后，2022-2025年普通批次位次稳定在122-190之间，且2025年较2024年前移约49名，呈竞争加剧趋势；2021-2025年理科组计划数：13、9、9、9、7人，呈逐步缩减趋势。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 上海交通大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名连续多年稳居第4名，属全国顶尖高校。

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次前移趋势（竞争加剧）、2026年本省考生总数小幅增加，以及上海交通大学作为全国Top4高校的持续吸引力，预计2026年理科组最低位次在2025年基准122名基础上进一步前移。预测最低位次约112名，区间62–162名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021-2025 Science Group (including Physics Category) minimum rankings: approximately 9550 in 2021 (including special batch of Agricultural College), approximately 190 in 2022, approximately 172 in 2023, approximately 171 in 2024, approximately 122 in 2025. Excluding the 2021 Agricultural College batch, the regular batch rankings from 2022 to 2025 stabilized between 122 and 190, and in 2025, the ranking moved forward by about 49 places compared to 2024, indicating an intensifying competition trend; enrollment plans for the Science Group from 2021 to 2025: 13, 9, 9, 9, 7 people, showing a gradual reduction trend.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai Jiao Tong University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. It has consistently ranked 4th in the Soft Science China University Rankings for many years, making it a top national university.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of candidates for the regular college entrance examination in Guizhou Province is approximately 299,000, a slight increase compared to 2025 (Physics Category 207,171 + History Category 90,087 ≈ 297,258), leading to a slight intensification of competition. Regarding the provincial control line, the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch score is 387, which has remained stable in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the forward trend of rankings in 2025 (intensified competition), a slight increase in the total number of candidates in the province in 2026, and the sustained appeal of Shanghai Jiao Tong University as a top 4 national university, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for the Science Group in 2026 will further move forward based on the 2025 benchmark of 122. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 112, with a range of 62 to 162.
